title: pilularia novae-hollandiae
intro: Pilularia novae-hollandiae, also known as the 'Shore Clubmoss', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Pilulariaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its rich content of antioxidants and essential oils. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use by making infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and allergies.
